---
title: "The Grammar of Refusal"
subtitle: "Public Libraries and Indian Democracy, 2014–2025"
author: "The Right to Read Campaign"
date: "2026-05-16"
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <script src="../../assets/data.js"></script>
      <script src="data_bridge.js"></script>
---

## The Origin {background-color="#000"}

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="40%"}
![](../assets/pantheon.png)
:::
::: {.column width="60%"}
### 1848
**Jotirao + Savitribai Phule**  
Pune, India.

"Reading is not a hobby.  
It is a political act of rebellion."
:::
:::
